actual_current_surface_status: exact negative boundary / SU2 generator-Casimir normalization does not certify PR230 g2
blocked_shortcut: Do not infer the missing electroweak g2 certificate from SU(2) generator norms, fundamental Casimir 3/4, or the bare convention g2^2=1/4.  A physical g2 still requires an allowed action normalization, matching/running bridge, or direct non-observed certificate.
exact_next_action: Supply a strict non-observed g2 authority that includes the canonical gauge-field/action normalization and any allowed low-scale matching, then rerun the electroweak g2 builder.
proposal_allowed_reason: Generator and Casimir normalization fix representation charges, not the low-scale physical coupling coefficient of the canonical gauge field.
